programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Notorious Nun
programme.desc: Father Thomas ONeil Timothy Bottoms is murdered and a nun Sister Margaret Michele Greene with whom he was rumoured to be having an affair is arrested as the suspect in the scandalous crime Perry Mason Raymond Burr now a judge is asked by his pal Archbishop Stefan Corro to look into it With not only Mason but his secretary Della Street Barbara Hale and his recent investigative partner Paul Drake Jr William Katt on the case Margarets name may be cleared

programme.title: Terror At London Bridge
programme.desc: When the London bridge is fully laid a murder spree begins Don Gregory suspects that the bridges historical link to Jack The Ripper and the Thames River may have something to do with the killings

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A reporter on the airbase is bent on trying to prove that one of Gen Savages gunners is an escaped convicted murderer

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick discovers an ancient terrifying evil is behind a series of grizzly murders plaguing the city and he may not be able to stop it

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A priest who is giving last rights to a woman on death row is seduced and plans and unimaginable escape from the death house with a very tragic ending Later Violet Rodriguez attempts to escape the same way hoping for better results

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS agents from all over are each carrying one piece of a bomb that is going to be used against a government base Max has to disarm it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hawaiian detective Harry Hoo and Max track his old nemesis The Claw to a San Francisco laundry

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 1

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Theres a noisy new neighbor in the hood and her name is Zsa Zsa

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols dad comes to visit for the first time and Mister Ed has a hot date so he visits the local car wash to get a good shower

programme.title: Hogans 306
programme.desc: Hogans 306

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is ordered to purchase one of Chief Urulus islands for the construction of a radar station But Urulu - Knowing that hes got The Navy over a barrel - Inflates the price of his real estate to ridiculous levels So McHale and The Crew try to help The Captain out with a scheme to de-value The Chiefs land

programme.title: Mchale 405
programme.desc: Mchale 405

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa has Luke prepared for the worst when it is learned that Kates mother is coming for a visit but everyone is surprised when she arrives and repeatedly chides Kate for being insufficiently attentive to Lukes needs

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to infiltrate MADs laboratory that is producing a sleeping gas so powerful that it will send everyone in the world to fall asleep

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Research continues on the scarecrow probe Boone starts learning Taelon to interpret its messages The device meanwhile absorbs a scientist Rayna

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens continue to expand their operations Sparked by random footage shot by a reporter Harrisons the team descend on the previously abandoned town of Beeton where they find a bustling community that in theory should not exist

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A scientist from Alec Hollands past is employed by a businessman who claims he wants to build a recycling plant near the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will starts dating a girl from a carnival Her boss who is manipulating the young carnies wants to sacrifice Will to the forces of darkness in a scam to keep his young work force in line

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter Delmer Plebus Powells Gwent a huge spacecraft which defies aerodynamics and is an extension of Gwents genius and ego

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 216
programme.desc: Hercules 216

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jack Cole was arrested and imprisoned for stealing art treasures of a Latin nation The mission for Phelps and the IM team is to get the objects back But that wont be easy Coles being tortured by the colonel who heads the prison -- and the colonels a traitor who wants the treasure for himself The IMF plans calls for playing the 2 men each deadly off each other

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble is arrested after a fight breaks out when the fishing boat he works on returns to a heated dockworkers strike

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: As unrest grips a distant mining town where the Barkleys have financial interests Heath travels to the place in an attempt to diffuse the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes to the aid of a woman but finds she has double-crossed him He tracks her down finding her a owner of a herd of cattle being driven to Kansas He joins drive as a hand but his expertise may bring him a big payday

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Fire Birds
programme.desc: Elite Apache helicopter pilots are tasked with destroying powerful armed drug cartels operating in South America

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trenton Rowell trains out of two different gyms in his small town, perfecting his ground game at one and working his striking at the other. He loves MMA, and is always looking for new ways to grow his skills regardless of his results. Trenton epitomizes Process over Outcome in his training, as he never focuses on the title, but rather simply trying to be in the best shape possible while balancing work, MMA and family life.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Rising Star Ryan Dickson including never seen before interviews and his fights in chronological order.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Orion a professional hunter gets Saw Boss permission to hunt Jayce without any interference Orion is fascinated by Jayces skill and wants him as a trophy prize Orion kidnaps Jayce and puts him on a planet for the hunt to begin
